https://openminds.om-i.org/props/emitter._instruction: Add the organization that governs and/or emits the identifier.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/emitter.label: Emitter
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/emitter.name: emitter

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif._instruction: Enter a persistent, unique identifier emitted by an organization.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.description: Term or code used to identify something or someone.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.label: Identifier
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/identif.name: identifier

https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type._instruction: Enter the type of identifier, e.g. 'PubMed ID'.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.description: Distinct class to which a group of entities or concepts with similar characteristics or attributes belong to.
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.label: Type
https://openminds.om-i.org/props/type.name: type
